checks.name: standard_verify
checks.command: python3 -c "import html.parser; html.parser.HTMLParser().feed(open('app.html').read())" && grep -q 'executeGAS' app.html && grep -q 'GAS_URL' app.html && echo 'VERIFY_PASSED'

checks.name: inline_js_parse
checks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('app.html','utf8'); const m=html.match(/<script>([\\s\\S]*)<\\/script>/); new Function(m[1]); console.log('JS_PARSE_PASSED')"

checks.name: execute_gas_payload_policy
checks.notes: Matches are existing sync/init/read paths: syncPendingChanges, executeGAS definition, handleInit, loadScheduleForCurrentWeek. No new per-operation write executeGAS call was added.

checks.name: spreadsheet_write_policy
checks.notes: Spreadsheet writes remain inside syncPendingChanges and handleInit. loadScheduleForCurrentWeek is read-only.
